UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user sustainability profiles, geographic configurations, and carbon budget details.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name of the candidate.

email.description: E-mail address associated with the account.

location.description: Regional tier city to determine grid emission coefficients.

commuteMode.description: Primary vehicle type used for daily commute.

commuteDistance.description: Average daily transit mileage in km.

dailyBudgetKg.description: Target daily footprint budget in kilograms of CO2.

streakCount.description: Number of consecutive active tracking days.

lastActiveDate.description: ISO date string of last active tracking date.

totalDaysLogged.description: Total number of unique days user logged activities.

committedActionsCount.description: Number of actions committed from the Action Hub.

daysUnderBudget.description: Number of days where daily carbon total is under 6.8 kg budget.

dailyCO2History.description: Daily logged emission totals and dates.

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Logs individual mass carbon discharges under Transport, Food, Energy, Shopping, and Waste scopes.

userId.description: Reference to the owner user's UID.

category.description: Scope category: transport, food, energy, shopping, waste.

subcategory.description: Specific action logged, matching India emission index keys.

unit.description: Dimension unit, e.g. km, kWh, kg, items.

co2Kg.description: Total computed environmental output in kg CO2.

date.description: ISO Date string associated with the log entry: YYYY-MM-DD.

AIInsight.title: AIInsight
AIInsight.description: AI-generated telemetry analysis explaining personal footprint trends, with specific action suggestions.

userId.description: Reference to the owner user's UID.

generatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when recommendations were compiled.

co2ImpactKg.description: Estimated potential weekly carbon reduction in kg.

Certificate.title: Certificate
Certificate.description: Global CarbonSense avoidance credential validation specifications.

id.description: Unique certificate ID matching index syntax.

carbonReduction.description: Annual net carbon reduction in kg.

issueDate.description: ISO date string when the certificate was locked.

/users/{userId}.description: Main user collection holding individual profiles.

/users/{userId}/activities/{activityId}.description: Activity discharge records of the candidate.

/users/{userId}/insights/{insightId}.description: Historic AI feedback items compiled for the candidate.

/certificates/{certificateId}.description: Global certificates directory allowing public read-only validation lookups.
